clusters.justification: These terms share underlying co-activation in the anterior insula, amygdala, and anterior cingulate cortex, representing the macro-level processing of valence, arousal, and emotional reactivity.

This cluster reflects activation in the ventral striatum, orbitofrontal cortex, and dopaminergic midbrain, unified by the broad computation of subjective value, incentive salience, and goal-directed selection.

These terms share robust co-activation within the default mode network, anchoring the macro-level capacity to generate abstract internal representations of self-identity, interpersonal dynamics, and social narratives.
